purpose: Seed real official screenshots for the tool detail media gallery (Phase 2). Images are official marketing/product screenshots from each tool's own site. Uploaded as tool-media/{slug}.json by scripts/content-import/import-tool-media.mjs. Embeds (bilibili/youtube) are supported by the schema but not seeded here.

items.caption: TinyPNG 采用智能有损压缩，在大幅缩小体积的同时肉眼几乎看不出差别。
官方示例：同一张图片压缩前后的文件体积对比。
Obsidian 的本地 Markdown 笔记界面，支持双向链接与实时预览。
